title: Trophaeum kingii
taxonomy: Trophaeum kingii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Trophaeum, which is a group of flowering plants. Further classification of Trophaeum kingii includes its order Lamiales, which is a larger group of flowering plants that also includes mint, basil, and snapdragons. Within the family Gesneriaceae, Trophaeum kingii is part of the subfamily Didymocarpoideae. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants.
